name: Yonsei University Visit
description: Explore the foreign student curriculum and academic environment at one of Korea's top private universities.

name: Seoul National University
description: Visit Korea's most prestigious university campus and learn about academic programs.

name: KAIST
description: Experience Asia's #1 innovation university, Korea's premier science and technology research institution.

name: KMOU (Korea Maritime & Ocean University)
description: Explore the specialized curriculum of Korea's leading maritime institution located on its own island.

name: Busan National University
description: Visit one of Korea's flagship national universities, famous for engineering.

name: Ewha Womans University
description: Tour the world's largest women's university with its stunning ECC building.

name: DMZ Tour
description: Visit the Demilitarized Zone — Imjingak Park, 3rd Tunnel, and Dora Observatory for peace education.

name: National Assembly Library
description: Tour Korea's legislative library supporting parliamentary democracy.

name: Songam Stars Valley
description: Visit one of Korea's largest space-themed observatory parks.

name: Samsung Innovation Museum
description: Discover the past, present and future of electronics industry innovation.

name: Hyundai Motor Ulsan Plant
description: Tour the world's largest single automobile plant producing 1.6 million cars per year.

name: Hyundai Heavy Industries
description: Visit the world's largest shipbuilder that has built over 1,800 large vessels.

name: KARI (Korea Aerospace Research Institute)
description: Explore Korea's space agency and aerospace technology development.

name: Kori Nuclear Power Plant
description: Visit the world's 6th largest nuclear power supplier facility.

name: Robot Engineering Center
description: Experience intelligent robotics, drones, and 3D printing technology.

name: KIA Motors Sohari Plant
description: Tour automobile manufacturing processes.

name: Hanbok Experience
description: Wear traditional Korean costume and take photos at royal palaces.

name: Kimchi Making (UNESCO)
description: Learn to make Korea's iconic fermented dish, a UNESCO Intangible Heritage.

name: Gimbap Making
description: Make Korean-style rice rolls in a hands-on cooking class.

name: Taekwondo Experience
description: Learn basic martial arts moves of Korea's traditional combat sport.

name: Korean Cooking Class
description: Cook Korean dishes like Shabu-shabu and Bulgogi.

name: K-pop Dance Class + MV
description: Learn K-pop choreography and shoot your own music video.

name: K-Beauty Experience
description: Experience the Korean beauty routine with masks and skincare.

name: Nanta Show
description: Watch the iconic non-verbal percussion cooking performance.

name: Painters HERO
description: Enjoy live drawing art performance with comedy and dance.

name: KBS Drama Studio
description: Visit a professional TV drama filming studio.

name: Gyeongbok Palace
description: Explore Korea's largest and most iconic royal palace with breathtaking traditional architecture.

name: N Seoul Tower
description: Enjoy panoramic views of Seoul from this iconic landmark with observation decks and restaurants.

name: Bukchon Hanok Village
description: Wander through traditional Korean houses and charming alleyways in this preserved historic village.

name: Insadong
description: Browse traditional antiques, galleries, and tea houses on Seoul's most culturally vibrant street.

name: Cheonggyecheon Stream
description: Stroll along this restored urban stream that winds through downtown Seoul with scenic walkways.

name: Myeongdong
description: Shop at Korea's busiest shopping district featuring international brands and local boutiques.

name: Hongdae
description: Experience Seoul's trendy artistic neighborhood with street art, cafes, and boutique shops.

name: DDP (Dongdaemun Design Plaza)
description: Visit this futuristic architectural marvel hosting design exhibitions and cultural events.

name: Haedong Yonggungsa
description: Visit this stunning seaside temple perched on cliffs overlooking the East Sea.

name: Gamcheon Culture Village
description: Explore colorful hillside houses and street art in this charming bohemian village.

name: Haeundae Beach
description: Relax on Busan's most famous sandy beach with modern facilities and vibrant atmosphere.

name: Oryukdo Skywalk
description: Walk on glass platforms suspended over the sea with breathtaking coastal views.

name: Nami Island
description: Stroll through this picturesque island paradise famous for tree-lined paths and scenic landscapes.

name: Everland
description: Experience Korea's premier theme park with thrilling rides and beautiful seasonal attractions.
